subject: Aico 8 human-guided remake Skill

basis.supervised_trial: Steps v19e retained supervised research trial

verified_properties: The Skill contains no runtime, renderer, compatibility, signing, or packaging implementation.
The four human stops appear in contract order and Agent-created or inferred decisions are forbidden.
Retained supervised trials are distinct from full-validation authorization and publication rights.
The Web workflow retains the 1024-square layout and scope-relative PWA requirements.
Detailed commands route to versioned repository Jobs and selectors.
A fresh read-only Agent stopped at semantic-intent instead of selecting an ambiguous fixture or inferring approval.
Every portable stop proposal now binds transfer identity, immediate revision lineage, required criteria, content-addressed evidence, claim limits, and Agent authority limits before submission.
Pinned host profiles deny all Agent mutation authority, while signed receipts bind registration, challenge, and committed monotonic-head transitions to the independently fetched prior head.
limitations: Interactive user approval is session-local and not a portable detached signature.

The host contracts are implemented, but a separately protected deployment must still prove key isolation, reviewer-only decisions, transactional head CAS, CI fresh-head queries, and an independent rollback anchor before portable acceptance can be claimed.
Steps remains a private research/test trial and is not a complete-game or publication-authorized release.
